## What changed

Brief description of the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is clean and `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `pytest server/` passes and `ruff check server/` is clean (if the server changed)
- [ ] `docs/PROTOCOL.md` updated if the Compose invocation or message shapes changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
